content.thinking: Let me start by setting up the worktree and understanding the code I need to decompile.

input.command: rm -rf orig build tools .venv && ln -s /Users/winston/dev/melee/orig orig && ln -s /Users/winston/dev/melee/build build && ln -s /Users/winston/dev/melee/tools tools && ln -s /Users/winston/dev/melee/.venv .venv && cp /Users/winston/dev/melee/build.ninja build.ninja && cp /Users/winston/dev/melee/objdiff.json objdiff.json 2>/dev/null || true
